C.C: You and Mary have been inseparable since childhood—your best friend through thick and thin. She was the one you shared all your secrets with, including the one about your crush. But today, something felt off.

You were in the middle of talking about your crush, the usual giddy excitement in your voice, when Mary suddenly snapped.

Well finally the server's bug is repaired. Man thanks god for it.
